rows.label: xs04060100_SEL0011
rows.name: Step forward as if to protect Lin.

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0002
rows.name: H-Hey, you're in the way! I can't see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0003
rows.name: Leave it to me! I'll protect you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Doesn't look like the Bias[ST:wide ]―
no, I don't think so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ohh, to be lumped in with such
barbarians... How awful, just awful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0009
rows.name:
My individual designation is Lu Cirufe.
Please feel free to call me Lu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04060100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Like the Nopon over there, I am one who has
lived on this planet since ancient times.[ST:wait ]
